full_text:
DAY 0: 26.4.2021

Comments on the tissue: Large solid piece of tumor tissue with loose adipocytes on top. The receivied piece was all one big nodule. LN and FFPE pieces were taken from the very center of the piece, removing the outest part of the tissue. Adjacent pieces from both the left and right hand side were taken and processed for organoids in Färkkilä lab.

Sample preparation:

Total yield of cells: 11.05 x 106 cells per ml (total 5 mL).

DAY 1:

Treatment for 48 well plate and Shandon slides.

260 uL medium in 48- well plate. Treatment prepared for 300 uL = 7.5 x concentration.

6 wells per treatment.

Note! Next time prepare bigger volume.

Shandon slides: Existing 25 uL of medium was removed and treatment added as full volume.

Calculations can be found in Elina’s physical lab note book

Cultures were imaged using AxioVert (48 well plate) and EVOS (96 well plate)

Shandon slide layout:

DAY 4:

Medium was exchanged for 48-well plate cultures of prepared for DNA / RNA isolation

Comments: On day 1 cultures were very nice single cells, evenly distributed and had not dropped on the bottom of the wells.

On day 4 cells did not seem to have grown, so the decision was to continue the culture at least until Sunday (Day 6).

On day 6 cultures were looking exactly the same as on Day 4, so the decision was to terminate the culture on day 7 (Monday).

On day 7 spheroids were all 1-5 cells = very small. There were obvious differences between control and combination treatments, but still even in control the growth had been very poor. For future: maybe if there is no growth between day 0 – day 4, there will not be sudden burst of growth the following days either.

SUMMARY:

Treatment | Working concentration | Stock
Control | 0.1 % DMSO | 100 %
Olaparib | 20 µM | 10 mM
Olaparib | 40 µM | 10 mM
Pembrolizumab | 10 µg / mL | 5 mg / mL
Pembrolizumab | 50 µg / mL | 5 mg / mL
Combination 1 | 20 µM + 10 µg/ mL | 
Combination 2 | 40 µM + 50 µg/ mL |
